policy: exact official-site clone — public Gwangju Buk-gu portal (https://bukgu.gwangju.kr) rendered verbatim, no summary/redesign/approximation
source_url_domain_policy: source_url must be under https://bukgu.gwangju.kr (official public Buk-gu portal). Any other host is rejected.
network_required_at_runtime_policy: normal tests must not require external lookup; network_required_at_runtime must be false for all registered pages.

completeness_note: The apartment-dept route is backed by one complete canonical official snapshot and registered as exact. Official or unresolved official-looking renderer routes remain under capture_required until complete official captures land. complaint-review and handoff-stop are registered separately as non-official product_transitions and must never be represented as exact official pages. Two deprecated quests are not renderer routes and are excluded from this manifest.
